description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and installs sshpass in a before_script step (apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq sshpass). Cache the node_modules/ directory between runs. Add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch and executes the following shell commands in order: rm ./package-lock.json, npm install, npm run build, rm -rf .git, rm -rf node_modules, sshpass -V, export SSHPASS=$PASSWD, and sshpass -e scp -o stricthostkeychecking=no -r . root@178.128.240.68:/var/www/html. The job uses the $PASSWD secret for authentication and does not define explicit stages, artifacts, or services.
